name: Data Science AI MCP
description: ML/Data Science toolkit: feature importance ranking, model comparison, dataset profiling, correlation finding, and visualization recommendations. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: feature_importance
tools.description: Rank features by estimated importance for a prediction task.

tools.name: model_comparison
tools.description: Compare ML models across metrics. Returns composite scores, speed

tools.name: dataset_profiler
tools.description: Profile a dataset: completeness, quality issues, type distribution,

tools.name: correlation_finder
tools.description: Compute pairwise Pearson correlations between variables. Flags strong

tools.name: visualization_recommender
tools.description: Recommend visualizations based on data characteristics and analysis goal.
